sentences.english: I always carry a backpack to school.
Inside my bag I have my textbooks, a pencil case, and a water bottle.
sentences.korean: 가방 안에 교과서 필통 물병이 있어요.

sentences.english: I also keep some snacks in the front pocket.
My bag is blue and it has a dinosaur keychain on the zipper.
sentences.korean: 가방은 파란색이고 지퍼에 공룡 열쇠고리가 달려 있어요.

sentences.english: My mom bought it for me when I started middle school.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
